Install YantrAI

Get the app on this device — opens full-screen, works offline, and launches from your home screen in one tap.

On iPhone/iPad (Safari):
1. Tap the Share button (□↑)
2. Choose “Add to Home Screen”
3. Tap Add

YantrAI Tasks

Outcomes Marketplace & Assignment Tracking

Active Tasks

Masters

Party Master and Item Master power every downstream rule — GST, TDS, ITR, HSN summaries. Keep them complete and accurate.

AI walks Party + Item master. Proposes fills for missing GSTIN / PAN / Place of Supply / HSN / GST rate / Unit / Standard Rate. Review inline — nothing is changed until you click Apply.

📋 Chart of Accounts

Your complete Tally chart of accounts — every ledger grouped by its account group. Read-only mirror of Tally Prime.

👥 Business Party Profiles

Autonomous accounts learned from invoice headers, containing verified GSTINs and bank payout configurations.

Party Name GSTIN PAN Email ID Phone No Address Bank Payout Details Actions

📦 Inventory Item Master

Autonomous items learned from confirmed invoices, grouped by name to track procuring prices and source vendors.

Item Description HSN/SAC Code Unique Price Points Source Vendors (Procured From) Actions

🔄 Reconciliation Studio

Template-driven reconciliation for GST 2B, Payment Gateways, OTAs, E-commerce, and more. Pick a template, upload your master file, add platform reports, and verify variances. (For bank statements, use Bank Reco in the sidebar.)

Your Reconciliation Sessions

Loading sessions...

Step 1 — Pick a Template

Session

📋 Step 2 — Upload Master File

Upload your internal source of truth (e.g., PMS export, Tally vouchers, Order log).

📥 Step 3 — Upload Platform / External Reports

Add one or more external reports to reconcile against the master.

Step 4 — Reconciliation Results

Discrepancy Log

🧾 GST Filing Assistant

Auto-generate GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B from your Tally data. Validate before filing. Download GSTN-portal-compatible JSON.

Filing Period:

📤 GSTR-1 — Outward Supplies

📊 GSTR-3B — Summary & Tax Payable

🔗 Connect

Link your workspace with your CA, accountant, auditor, staff or clients — like adding a contact. Share your Workspace ID, or connect to theirs.

Your Workspace ID
—
Share this ID with anyone who needs access to your books. They enter it and send a request — you choose their role and which companies to share when you approve.

Connect to a workspace

They choose your role and which companies to share when they accept your request.

WhatsApp Setup

Configure WhatsApp Business API to receive invoices and receipts directly via messages.

📱 WhatsApp Business Integration

⚠️ Setup Instructions

  1. Go to Meta for Developers → Your App → WhatsApp → Configuration
  2. Set the Callback URL to your webhook URL above
  3. Set the Verify Token to the value shown above
  4. Subscribe to messages webhook field
  5. Send an image of any invoice to the connected WhatsApp number — YantrAI will auto-parse it!

📝 Edit Voucher

Edits are saved in YantrAI only. The voucher is flagged needs resync until you push it back to Tally.

Ledger Entries (Dr = Cr)
Ledger Debit (₹) Credit (₹)
Totals ₹0.00 ₹0.00
Debit and Credit totals must match before you can save.
